info.description: Go backend for a couples' finance management app.
info.title: Finance App API

get.summary: Count pending charges requiring caller's action

post.description: Creates an expense, income, or transfer. For recurring transactions include recurrence_settings. For split transactions include split_settings.

get.description: Returns net balance (income − expenses) for the given month/year. Set accumulated=true to include all prior periods.

post.description: Returns whether a transaction with the given date, description and amount already exists for the authenticated user.
post.summary: Check if a transaction is a duplicate

post.description: Accepts a multipart CSV file and an account_id. Returns parsed rows enriched with inferred categories and duplicate flags. No transactions are created; use the standard POST /transactions endpoint to create each confirmed row.
post.summary: Parse and enrich a CSV file for import

get.description: Returns up to `limit` transactions whose description matches the query string (PostgreSQL text search). Used for autocomplete when creating a new transaction.

put.description: All fields are optional. Use propagation_settings to control how updates affect recurring installments.

post.summary: Accept an invite using the inviter's external ID

get.summary: Get user info by external ID (for invite preview)

post.description: Issues a JWT auth cookie for the given email without OAuth. Only available when ENV != production.

get.description: Redirects the user to the OAuth provider's authorization page
Completes the OAuth flow, sets the auth_token HttpOnly cookie, and redirects to the frontend

account_id.description: optional; when set, only checks within that account

CookieAuth.description: JWT token in HttpOnly cookie set after OAuth login
CookieAuth.name: auth_token
